display.purpose: Editorial brand headlines only — public ordering, landing hero. Forbidden in dashboard UI.

headline.purpose: Dashboard page titles; fixed rem, never fluid.

title.purpose: Card titles, section and dialog headers.

body.purpose: Default dashboard text at 0.875rem; prose caps 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Buttons, form labels, badges, table headers.

numeric.purpose: All money, counts, metrics; tabular-nums, ar-EG numerals in Arabic.

shadows.name: hairline
shadows.purpose: Inputs and outline buttons — just enough to seat the control.

shadows.name: resting-card
shadows.purpose: Cards and StatCards at rest. The maximum the dashboard carries (Flat-Dashboard Rule).

shadows.name: lifted
shadows.purpose: Popovers, command palette, dialogs, brand-surface hero imagery.

shadows.name: brand-glow
shadows.value: filter: blur(40px); background: linear-gradient(to top right, oklch(0.27 0.05 250 / 0.15), transparent)
shadows.purpose: Decorative atmosphere behind marketing/auth/public-ordering heroes only. Never on dashboard data.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and reveals — exponential ease-out, no bounce.

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: Most product transitions (hover, focus, open). Users are in flow; no choreography.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: App-wide respect for prefers-reduced-motion; every animation needs a reduced alternative.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action across the dashboard — Harbor Navy fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:.5rem; height:2.25rem; padding:0 1rem; border:0; border-radius:.625rem; background:var(--primary, oklch(0.27 0.05 250)); color:var(--primary-foreground, oklch(0.985 0.004 85)); font:500 .875rem/1 "Inter Variable", system-ui, sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition:background .15s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow .15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary, oklch(0.27 0.05 250)) 90%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring, oklch(0.58 0.132 38)) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity:.5; pointer-events:none; }

components.name: Brand Button
components.description: The single most important CTA on a surface — Terracotta Clay. Use sparingly (One-Voice Accent Rule).
components.css: .ds-btn-brand { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:.5rem; height:2.25rem; padding:0 1rem; border:0; border-radius:.625rem; background:var(--brand, oklch(0.58 0.132 38)); color:var(--brand-foreground, oklch(0.99 0.004 85)); font:500 .875rem/1 "Inter Variable", system-ui, sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition:background .15s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow .15s; } .ds-btn-brand:hover { background:color-mix(in oklch, var(--brand, oklch(0.58 0.132 38)) 90%, transparent); } .ds-btn-brand:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring, oklch(0.58 0.132 38)) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action — Card White on a hairline Border Sand stroke.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:.5rem; height:2.25rem; padding:0 1rem; border:1px solid var(--border, oklch(0.91 0.008 80)); border-radius:.625rem; background:var(--card, oklch(1 0 0)); color:var(--foreground, oklch(0.27 0.05 250)); font:500 .875rem/1 "Inter Variable", system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor:pointer; transition:background .15s, box-shadow .15s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background:var(--accent, oklch(0.955 0.012 70)); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring, oklch(0.58 0.132 38)) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field; terracotta focus ring, no layout shift.
components.css: .ds-input { display:block; width:100%; height:2.25rem; padding:.25rem .75rem; border:1px solid var(--input, oklch(0.91 0.008 80)); border-radius:.625rem; background:transparent; color:var(--foreground, oklch(0.27 0.05 250)); font:400 .875rem/1.5 "Inter Variable", system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition:color .15s, box-shadow .15s, border-color .15s; outline:none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.52 0.02 255)); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color:var(--ring, oklch(0.58 0.132 38)); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring, oklch(0.58 0.132 38)) 50%, transparent); } .ds-input[aria-invalid="true"] { border-color:var(--destructive, oklch(0.585 0.22 27)); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Resting container — Card White, hairline border, soft shadow, generous padding.
components.html:
Today’s revenue
All branches · Cairo time
components.css: .ds-card { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:.5rem; padding:1.5rem; border:1px solid var(--border, oklch(0.91 0.008 80)); border-radius:1rem; background:var(--card, oklch(1 0 0)); color:var(--card-foreground, oklch(0.27 0.05 250)); box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.08); } .ds-card-title { font:600 1.125rem/1.3 "Inter Variable", system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-desc { font:400 .875rem/1.5 "Inter Variable", system-ui, sans-serif; color:var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.52 0.02 255)); }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Signature KPI tile: tinted icon chip, label, large tabular value, signed trend. The 'trust the numbers' surface.
components.html:
Net revenue
EGP 48,25012.3%
components.css: .ds-stat { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:.5rem; padding:1.5rem; border:1px solid var(--border, oklch(0.91 0.008 80)); border-radius:1rem; background:var(--card, oklch(1 0 0)); box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.08); min-width:13rem; } .ds-stat-chip { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:2.25rem; height:2.25rem; border-radius:.625rem; background:color-mix(in oklch, var(--brand, oklch(0.58 0.132 38)) 10%, transparent); color:var(--brand, oklch(0.58 0.132 38)); } .ds-stat-label { font:500 .75rem/1.4 "Inter Variable", system-ui, sans-serif; color:var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.52 0.02 255)); } .ds-stat-row { display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:.5rem; } .ds-stat-value { font:600 1.5rem/1.1 "Inter Variable", system-ui, sans-serif; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; color:var(--foreground, oklch(0.27 0.05 250)); } .ds-stat-trend { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:.125rem; font:500 .8125rem/1 "Inter Variable", system-ui, sans-serif; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; color:var(--success, oklch(0.55 0.1 160)); }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item (active)
components.description: App rail item; active state marked with Terracotta Clay.
components.html: DashboardOrders
components.css: .ds-nav { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:.125rem; padding:.5rem; width:14rem; background:var(--sidebar, oklch(0.975 0.005 85)); border-radius:.75rem; } .ds-nav-item { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:.625rem; padding:.5rem .75rem; border-radius:.625rem; color:var(--sidebar-foreground, oklch(0.37 0.035 255)); font:500 .875rem/1 "Inter Variable", system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration:none; transition:background .15s, color .15s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background:var(--sidebar-accent, oklch(0.93 0.014 65)); color:var(--sidebar-accent-foreground, oklch(0.27 0.05 250)); } .ds-nav-item--active { background:color-mix(in oklch, var(--sidebar-primary, oklch(0.58 0.132 38)) 12%, transparent); color:var(--sidebar-primary, oklch(0.58 0.132 38)); }

narrative.overview: Madar is an honest accounting book bound in warm materials. Every figure is precise, auditable, and ledger-true — orders, shifts, and inventory are append-only, so the interface never implies a mutation the system can't make. But the surface is hospitable, not clinical: a tool for someone's livelihood in F&B that should feel like the warm front counter of a good coffee shop, not a grey ERP terminal. The system speaks in two volumes by register: quiet, restrained, precise in the authenticated dashboard (product); bold and editorial on the customer surfaces (brand) carried by the Fraunces serif and confident terracotta. Everything is bilingual by symmetry — Arabic is a peer of English, with logical-property layouts, ar-EG numerals, and Cairo-anchored dates.
keyCharacteristics: Ledger-honest — append-only reality reflected in the UI; no fake edit/delete affordances.
Warm precision — navy/terracotta/cream warmth over tabular-number accuracy.
Two volumes, one system — restrained product UI, bold editorial brand surfaces.
Bilingual by symmetry — EN/AR parity, logical properties, ar-EG numerals, Cairo dates.
Token-driven — semantic OKLCH tokens; class-driven dark mode; no hardcoded color.

rules.name: The One-Voice Accent Rule
rules.body: Terracotta Clay is the single brand accent. On any dashboard screen it should touch ≤10% of the surface — a CTA, the active nav marker, a focus ring, the lead chart series. Its rarity is what makes it read as the action.

rules.name: The Dark-Mode Inversion Rule
rules.body: Navy is the light-mode primary; terracotta is the dark-mode primary. Brand panels must stay deep navy in dark mode and let terracotta live only in blurred accent glows.

rules.name: The No-Color-Alone Rule
rules.body: Status is never encoded in color alone. Pair every status color with an icon or label so it survives color-blindness and grayscale.

rules.name: The Serif-Is-A-Guest Rule
rules.body: Fraunces appears only on brand surfaces. It is forbidden in dashboard UI — labels, buttons, table cells, and data are always Inter.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: Dashboard type uses a fixed rem scale, never clamp(). Fluid type is a brand-surface privilege.

rules.name: The Flat-Dashboard Rule
rules.body: A dashboard surface never carries more than shadow-sm at rest. Elevation in the product is a response to state (hover, focus, open), not a resting decoration.

dos: Do consume semantic tokens (bg-background, text-foreground, bg-brand, bg-card) — never raw hex in components.
Do use logical properties everywhere (ps/pe, ms/me, start/end); every layout must flip cleanly for Arabic RTL.
Do keep Terracotta Clay to ≤10% of any dashboard screen (the One-Voice Accent Rule).
Do render money with the .tabular numeral utility and fmtMoney; respect piastres→EGP, ar-EG numerals, and Africa/Cairo dates.
Do reserve Fraunces for brand surfaces; use Inter for all dashboard UI.
Do pair every status color with an icon or label, and push body contrast toward AAA (≥7:1) on Linen Cream.
Do reflect the append-only ledger: surface voids, force-closes, and compensating reversals as first-class events.
Do give every interactive component its full state set and respect prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't drift Linen Cream into the generic SaaS-cream template: no gradient hero-metric cards, identical icon-card grids, or tiny tracked-uppercase eyebrows above every section.
Don't make discounts or delivery scream — no loud delivery-app neon, flashing promo banners, or garish discount badges.
Don't let the dashboard decay into an enterprise-grey snoozefest — density is welcome, deadness is not.
Don't go consumer toy-like — no bubbly oversized rounded shapes, no emoji-heavy UI.
Don't put a display serif, fluid clamp() heading, or decorative motion into dashboard data, labels, or buttons.
Don't float a resting card above shadow-sm, or flood a brand panel with full-saturation terracotta in dark mode.
Don't invent affordances for standard tasks; reach for inline/progressive patterns before a modal.
Don't imply a mutation the backend can't make — no fake 'edit' or 'delete' on orders, shifts, or inventory adjustments.
